constraint_check.WARN-AI-001: failing — AI input passed to provider without validation
constraint_check.WARN-AI-002: failing — Raw API key access — use a config module to centralize secret management

active.plain_language: Content from your users is sent directly to the AI in generateChatCompletion without being checked first. Crafted inputs could manipulate the AI's behavior.
active.detail: AI input passed to provider without validation
active.remediation: Add input validation (e.g. Zod schema.parse) before calling the AI provider.

active.plain_language: An API key in generateChatCompletion is accessed directly from code rather than from a secure configuration. This increases the risk of accidental exposure.
active.detail: Raw API key access — use a config module to centralize secret management
active.remediation: Move API keys to a config module or environment abstraction; avoid process.env in provider call sites.
